message:
fix: int64 precision loss in WasmAggregateOperator + Welford merge

WasmAggregateOperator: SUM/MIN/MAX on int64 columns cast WASM bigint
results to Number(), silently losing precision above 2^53. Now uses
native bigint accumulators (bigSum/bigMin/bigMax) and preserves bigint
in the output row. AVG returns Number since the result is floating-point.

Welford merge (partial-agg.ts): cross-shard STDDEV/VARIANCE on int64
columns used state.sum for mean calculation, but bigint columns only
update state.bigSum (sum stays 0). Delta was always 0, making the
correction term vanish. Now uses Number(bigSum) when available.
